title: TS18 2QF, Scott Bros. Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/JP3336HA/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Scott Bros. Limited   Installation name: Billingham Reed Beds   Permit number: EPR/JP3336HA/V005   "
